title: Modern GUI++
description: This is a texture pack that changes the original Minecraft GUI and includes: a modern GUI, full coverage of texture, rounded rectangles everywhere, transparent pixels, and dark mode!
body:
This texture pack modifies the original GUI with rounded rectangles, dark mode, modern ICON, **and more**.

This pack is made for some people to play at night, for entertainment, or simply to make the game better.

**Please note:** _In order to make the rounded corners and ICON clearer, the pixels of a single material are 20 times larger than the original, which may cause stuttering, and the low-pixel display may not have a visual experience with rounded corners!_
